title: Smoky Norwegian Pasta Bake
description: A creamy, smoky, and savory pasta bake featuring Norwegian flavors.
instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, sauté the mushrooms, onion, and garlic until softened.
Add the smoked salmon and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the creamy sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, mushroom mixture, and chopped parsley.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
